p.strong: Userspace to Wire Architecture & Implementation Spec (v2.1.0)
p.em: Focus: TAP Interface & Linux Kernel Network Subsystem

ol.li: Userspace Buffer: Data stored in send_buffer.
Encapsulation: Ethernet header (14B) prepended in userspace.
Syscall: write(tap_fd) copies frame to kernel memory.
Kernel skb: tun.c allocates sk_buff and notifies stack.
DMA: NIC fetches frame from dma_ring via PCIe Master.
DMA: NIC writes frame directly to kernel skb->data.
TAP Queue: Frame enqueued in tun->read_wait.
Parsing: Userspace stack strips headers and verifies CRC.

ul.li: Copy 3 (DMA): Kernel RAM → NIC SRAM (Zero CPU)

g.title: Writes data to socket file descriptor via VFS
Reads data from socket file descriptor via VFS
Writes data to socket file descriptor via VFS
Reads data from socket file descriptor via VFS
